Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Pride]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy's brother is named Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Pride will be informed of Mercy's participation in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Pride has swirling tattoos on his neck and face that serve as his Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Pride has not yet advanced to Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Pride is a member of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Pride has a Path with four available techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Pride is an Akura Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Pride is short and glaring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Pride uses shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Pride uses exclusively Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon's room is connected to Pride's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Pride ranked twenty-second in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is an entity that accompanies Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is a target for Lindon's dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is a character who can attack with his fists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Akura Pride ran ahead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Pride is a servant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Pride has black lines on his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Pride weathered the tide of fire from Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Pride is a character who was panting and bleeding on the sand next to Lindon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Pride shares a connecting room with Lindon and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Pride is Mercy's brother and an Underlord who directs traffic on the dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Pride is a member of Lindon's team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is finishing up acolytes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pride stands outside Lindon's script over a campfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is Akura Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pride is a master of Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Pride possesses bloodline armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Pride is someone Malice would sacrifice for her family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Pride emerged from the shadow of a building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Pride is the son of a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Pride is a person who will be isolated alongside Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Pride and Mercy were arguing near the evacuation portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Pride is the brother of Akura Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Pride was one of the people surrounded by enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Pride was in bad shape with a mangled left arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Pride survived the battle.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Pride has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Pride's Book contains many Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Pride is a person who told Mercy she doesn't need to be around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy fears seeing Pride badly hurt again.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon thinks about how Pride might feel seeing Mercy's situation.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Pride is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Pride has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Pride is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Pride is a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Pride possesses a red-and-silver Book wrapped in chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Pride's Book is a Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Pride gave Lindon a look at his book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Pride has a Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Pride is a sibling of Malice who could be called to assist if necessary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Pride was at Mercy's side.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael's build reminds Lindon of Akura Pride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Pride was the target of an assassination attempt involving Seishen Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Pride was brought along by Lindon when he ascended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Pride was taken by his half-brother, Fury, for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Pride's physical parameters are better than the average recruit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Pride is a three-star Wolf, two-star Ghost, two-star Fox, and one-star Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Pride does not fight for amusement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Pride is associated with the name Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Pride implied that certain devices in the Wolf Division are not free to activate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
